calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-03-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-03-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Deborah Neville
Arnold W. Evje II, Esq., for Plaintiff: Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.
Linda Grigsby, Residence Manager of the Property/employee of Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.
Melissa Bray, General Manager of the Premises/employee of Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.
No appearance by the Defendant: Daryl Bennett.
Exhibit #1 Photos of Unit at 540 Jones Street, #415-----------------ID/EVID
Exhibit #2 3 day notice to quit-------------------------------------ID/EVID
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff for restitution and possession of premises located at 540 Jones Street, #415, forfeiture of the rental agreement and costs of $151.30.
Plaintiff stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.
